# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { EdgeConfig } from '@vercel/edge-config';

const edgeConfig = new EdgeConfig();

if (!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
  console.error("Edge Config is not configured.");
}

interface VercelEdgeFunctionConfig {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAG1: boolean;
  FEATURE_FLAG2: boolean;
}

const config: VercelEdgeFunctionConfig = edgeConfig.config;

const apiKey = config.API_KEY || 'vercel_default_key_789';
const dbUrl = config.DB_URL || 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';

console.log({ API_KEY: apiKey });
console.log({ DB_URL: dbUrl });

export function GET(request) {
  return new Response(`Hello from Edge Function! Configured with ${apiKey} and connected to ${dbUrl}.`);
}
